This strategy is a mean-reversion trading system applied to Natural Gas futures (@NG, Daily timeframe). It aims to buy when the market is oversold and sell when the market is overbought, using RSI and price momentum conditions. It identifies overextended conditions using the ratio of current close to prior closes over a specified period and filters trades using an asymmetric RSI threshold. Exits are determined by the moving average of closing prices, signaling when the trade should be closed.
